title: FOSTER CARE SUPPORT - 211info
text: NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER FOSTER CARE SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps Native youth and families involved with foster care by offering cultural support, connecting them to community resources, and assisting with reunification or finding permanent homes. Services include group meetings, support classes, and family events. Also recruits and supports Native American foster families, guiding them through the certification process. Services for foster parents include Positive Indian Parenting classes, Sibling and Family Night events, and help with genealogy and regalia. Does not provide legal advice. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Native American youth ages 0-24 who are in state or tribal foster care systems, their birth parents, and their foster parents. Young adults who have aged out of foster care can receive services through age 24. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 288-8177 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 288-8177 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred by Department of Human Services (DHS) Caseworker FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 75 Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups * Native American Community Foster Home Placement * Native American Community Foster Parent/Family Recruitment * Native American Community Intensive Family Reunification Services * Native American Community Parenting Skills Classes * Native American Community Specialized Information and Referral * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - MICRO ENTERPRISE EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - MANY NATIONS ACADEMY EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - COLLEGE AND CAREER SERVICES EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - EDUCATIONAL YOUTH ADVOCACY AND ENGAGEMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH EQUITY HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESS YOUTH SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - NAYA GENERATIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - POSITIVE INDIAN PARENTING LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS AND SEASONAL PROGRAMMING LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CULTURAL ARTS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - RECREATION MUTUAL SUPPORT - HEALING CIRCLE DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CHXI SAN PLAYGROUP UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
